rubric_content.text_property: The response uses curated HyperAgents-ADK study evidence and names relevant datasets, studies, or evidence types when applicable.
The response clearly distinguishes validation-selected evidence from held-out test evidence and treats held-out evidence as stronger for generalization.
The response explains that validation gains can be fragile and should not be overclaimed as robust future performance.
The response frames HyperAgents-ADK as a financial research workflow and avoids trading or investment recommendations.
